markdown:
#  Why don’t I see invoices for the projects I am assigned to? 
### Answer
You cannot see the invoices for your projects because your role does not have the required permission. Only users with the designated "invoice review" project role can view these invoices. Check with your Direct Cost tool admin to understand what project role has been selected for invoice review, and ensure that you have been assigned that role on your projects.

title: Why don’t I see invoices for the projects I am assigned to?
